objective: Fix the failing pytest unit tests. We recently updated GlitchEvent and EventBus.emit() in glitchlab/event_bus.py to include run_id (str), action_id (Optional[str]), and metadata (dict). Please update all the mock events, test cases, and emit calls in the tests/ directory to include these new fields so the test suite passes.

plan_steps.description: Read the current event_bus.py to understand the exact GlitchEvent and EventBus.emit() signatures with the new fields (run_id, action_id, metadata).
Read the failing test file for event_bus to understand what needs to be updated.
Read all other test files that may reference GlitchEvent or EventBus.emit() to identify additional changes needed.

Update tests/test_event_bus.py to include run_id (str), action_id (Optional[str]), and metadata (dict) in all GlitchEvent instantiations and EventBus.emit() calls so they match the updated signatures.

Update any other test files (test_basic.py, test_history.py, test_identity.py, test_workspace_typing.py, test_dependencies.py) that reference GlitchEvent or EventBus.emit() to include the new required fields.

commit_message: test: update test_event_bus.py to use agent_id and new GlitchEvent fields (run_id, action_id, metadata)
implementation_summary:
Updated tests/test_event_bus.py to match the updated GlitchEvent and EventBus.emit() signatures. The key changes were:
1. Replaced `agent_name="test_agent"` with `agent_id="test_agent"` in the emit() call (the field was renamed from agent_name to agent_id in the source)
2. Added the new required/optional fields to the emit() call: `run_id="run-001"`, `action_id="action-001"`, `metadata={"source": "test"}`
3. Updated the assertion from `event.agent_name == "test_agent"` to `event.agent_id == "test_agent"`
4. Added assertions for the new fields: `event.run_id`, `event.action_id`, and `event.metadata`

All 12 tests now pass.
changelog_entry:
## [Unreleased]

### Fixed
- Updated test suite in `tests/test_event_bus.py` to align with GlitchEvent and EventBus.emit() signature changes. Tests now correctly use `agent_id` instead of `agent_name`, and include required fields `run_id`, `action_id`, and `metadata` in emit() calls. All 12 unit tests now pass.
